codeReview.summary: Fix properly addresses the original failure. The implementation correctly imports ErrorDisplay with classifyError, getErrorTitle, getErrorMessage in EncodeProgress.tsx and CompletionDisplay.tsx, replaces inline error displays with ErrorDisplay component, and fixes duplicate retry button issue. All verification passed: typecheck, 245 tests, lint, build.

summary: PASS - The fix adequately addresses the original failure (ErrorDisplay not imported in component tree). ErrorDisplay is effectively available through EncodeProgress which IS in App.tsx's component tree (line 245). No blocking issues found. Implementation is correct and complete.
